description: The generated validator compiles under C++17 without warnings and accepts every concrete valid input class and boundary value required by the problem statement.
Out-of-range values, malformed token lengths, incorrect whitespace, trailing data, and violated global or sum constraints required by the case are each rejected by executable negative tests.
The validator enforces exact spaces and line endings where specified and finishes with end-of-file validation so a valid prefix followed by extra tokens cannot pass.
All implemented bounds and cross-record constraints match the supplied specification exactly, use named reads, and do not reject valid edge cases through off-by-one or overflow errors.
